category_sources: source_facts.description says tools for biomedical signal processing and data conversion; current_curation.category_path lists science.
display_name_sources: Official project homepage is titled The BioSig Project; source_facts.name is biosig.
docs_sources: Official BioSig documentation page links user docs, function reference, wiki, supported data formats, and the Git repository; official project page describes BioSig components.
repo_sources: Official BioSig documentation page gives git clone https://git.code.sf.net/p/biosig/code biosig-code; SourceForge code page shows the repository tree.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official BioSig homepage describe biomedical signal processing, biosignal analysis, and BioSig for C/C++ tools.
